reviews.review_description:
I’ve worked in the fire sprinkler business for 12yrs for a well known company, this is a fantastic opportunity to learn more about the trade, and prevents any potential problems from happening on  site with the correct training with out being hands on site.. please keep updating and improving the experience.. few bugs I encountered was height difference i couldn’t set a height was lower then the value set, plus no snap turn, but will use this often to help improve my confidence.. Thank you 

🙏
